title: Welcome to the EIOSH community
body:
Welcome! This forum is a place for current and past learners to share questions, advice and stories from the field. A few ground rules:

• Stay constructive — disagree, but politely.
• No spam, no recruiting unless flagged for the jobs board.
• Anything that could be a safety incident at your workplace — please follow your internal reporting first, then anonymise here if useful for others.

To start a thread, sign in to /student first.
